heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 3666 Authorization of appropriations
text: For purposes of carrying out the activities under this subchapter, there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary for fiscal years 2011 through 2015.
notes: Amendments2010—, substituted “2011 through 2015” for “2000 through 2004”.Pub. L. 111–211, § 242(b)(3)(A)
amendments: Amendments2010—, substituted “2011 through 2015” for “2000 through 2004”.Pub. L. 111–211, § 242(b)(3)(A)
